    "cli": "autograder.cli.courses.users.enroll",
    "arguments": [
        '--course', 'course101',
        '--user', 'course-admin@test.edulinq.org',
        '--pass', 'course-admin',
        '--new-email', 'server-user@test.edulinq.org',
    ],
}
---

    "results": [
        {
            "email": "server-user@test.edulinq.org",
            "enrolled": [
                "course101"
            ],
            "modified": true
        }
    ]
}
